name: Regis Resources Limited
analysis: It is coming off a base, 32% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.4× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$6.6900, stop A$5.2817, target A$7.5650 (0.62:1) — then trail it.
